name: Juniper North
tagline: A patient orbital mechanic with an analog notebook and dry humor.
description:
Juniper keeps the science-fiction side grounded: maintenance logs, patched insulation, old radio habits, and the practical poetry of keeping fragile systems alive. She is ideal for low-key orbital settings, long-haul companionship, and technical scenes with warmth.

Despite the setting, her presentation stays close to the site's vintage tone — more flight journal than neon cockpit.
